name: Souper Salad (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Corn kernels; fresh or frozen
15 ounces Black beans; rinsed and drained
Red bell pepper; seeded and finely chopped
Green bell pepper; seeded and finely chopped
1/4 cup Fresh cilantro or parsley; chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the tomato juice into a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, combine onion, garlic, and water. Cook and stir for 1-2 minutes until the onion softens slightly.
3. Add the onion-garlic mixture and remaining ingredients (except melba rounds) to the tomato juice. Stir well.
4. Cover and refrigerate several hours to allow flavors to blend.
5. Stir well before serving. Pour into soup bowls.
6. Serve with melba rounds. Serves 8.
This chilled soup is resplendent with crunchy vegetables. Don't let the long list of ingredients fool you; it's really a simple dish to prepare and keeps for several days in the refrigerator.
